SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INPP_COPAY_OS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was only populated 2006–2012. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage rather than a 
co-payment amount will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment 
variable called (PRE_ICL_INPP_COINS_OS).
